title: Amtech L0535 31Piece Precision Screwdriver bit Set
features: IDEAL FOR DETAILED WORK: This precision screwdriver set is ideal for working on computers, mobile phones, glasses, watches, etc
VERSATILE: With a push-fit handle, it includes a useful assortment of slotted, Phillips and Torx screwdriver bits and comes in a storage case
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 31Pc Precision Screwdriver Set See more
